title: This chart shows which countries have won the most FIFA World ...
content: Brazil leads the list with 5 championships, followed by Germany and Italy with 4 each, while Argentina has 3. Uruguay and France have each won

title: Teams with the most World Cup titles - FIFA
content: 1st) Brazil – 5 titles 2nd) Germany – 4 titles 2nd) Italy – 4 titles 4th) Argentina – 3 titles 5th) France – 2 titles 5th) Uruguay – 2
